About me

Someone who likes to ship, not just plan.

I'm a Computer Science and Business Systems undergraduate at VIT-AP University, currently ranked 7th in my branch with a 9.55 CGPA. I spend most of my time at the intersection of clean engineering and useful product — building full-stack apps with React, Next.js, and Node.js, and reaching for AI where it genuinely improves the experience.

My biggest project to date is an AI-powered learning platform that personalizes course content for over 1,000 users using the Gemini API. Alongside coursework, I've merged 50+ pull requests as an open-source contributor with GirlScript Summer of Code, and solved 300+ DSA problems on LeetCode — because strong fundamentals make every other project easier.

AI Online Learning Platform
